name: code-oss
title: code-oss
description:
Open Source package of vscode
This package contains code-oss, a code editor with what developers need for
their core edit-build-debug cycle. It provides comprehensive code editing,
navigation, and understanding support along with lightweight debugging, a rich
extensibility model, and lightweight integration with existing tools.
.
This package is built from Microsoft open source code named code-oss.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use code because Open Source package of vscode.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use code as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `code [options] [args]` as documented upstream for code.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair code with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `code --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
